/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libamy_test__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libamy_test__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/amy_test__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/amy_test/msg/detail/tape_contour__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/copperbottoms/code/Copperbottoms/ros_ws/build/amy_test:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libamy_test__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
